They are coached by Director of Rugby [[Mike Eccles]]. The Broncos will compete in both the [[2024 Super League]] and the [[2024 Challenge Cup]]. They were promoted to the [[Super League]] as winners of the 2023 [[Championship Grand Final]]. ==Preseason friendlies== {| class="wikitable" style="font-size:85%;" !Date and time!!Versus!!H/A!!Venue!!Result!!Score!!Tries!!Goals!!Attendance!!Report |- style="background:#ffffdd;" | 21 January; 15:00 |{{leagueicon|Castleford Tigers|12}} [[Castleford Tigers]] | A | [[The Jungle (Wheldon Road)|The Jungle]] | D | 14-14 | [[Robbie Storey|Storey]], [[Oliver Leyland|O.
